app.title: PedidosWeb
login.title: PedidosWeb
login.subtitle: Commercial portal for customers and sales reps with secure access to orders, documents and operational tracking.
login.hint: Enter your credentials to continue. If this is your first access, you will be able to update your password afterwards.
auth.noPermission: You do not have access to the portal.
auth.noCommercialProfile: User without a configured commercial profile.
changePassword.title: Change password
changePassword.firstLoginGate: You must change your password before continuing.
auth.passwordPolicy: The new password must have at least 8 characters, one letter and one number.
auth.passwordConfirmationMismatch: Confirmation does not match the new password.
auth.newPasswordSameAsCurrent: The new password must differ from the current one.
auth.unauthenticated: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
auth.passwordRecoveryEmailSent: If the email exists, we will send a password reset link.
auth.passwordResetSuccess: Your password was reset. You can now sign in with the new password.
auth.passwordResetTokenInvalidOrExpired: The recovery link is invalid or expired. Request a new one.
auth.recovery.forgot.title: Recover password
auth.recovery.forgot.intro: Enter your email address to receive a reset link.
auth.recovery.forgot.genericError: Could not process the recovery request.
auth.recovery.reset.title: Reset password
auth.recovery.reset.intro: Choose a new password for your account.
preferences.localeSaveFailed: Could not save language. Keeping the current language.
preferences.themeSaveFailed: Could not save theme. Keeping the current theme.

shell.menu.error: Could not load the menu. The portal remains available.
shell.menu.empty: No menu options available for your profile.
